hero.title:
An MVP built by AI alone
is meaningless.
subtitleLines: In the age of building fast with AI, the value of a system is determined by human judgment.
Understanding the business is a human's job.

features.rapid: We will show you a working prototype on the day of the meeting and immediately bring your requirements to life
features.development: Seamless transition with consistent development framework from prototype to full system
features.expertise: Build practical, high-utility systems with AI solutions tailored to real business challenges

manifesto.heading: With AI,
manifesto.headingLine2: prototypes, MVPs, and code can be created in an instant.
manifesto.headingSub: The ability to "build" itself no longer holds special value.

problem.title: The question is not what to build, but
problem.titleHighlight: whether you can judge what not to build.
problem.description: MVPs built by AI without understanding the business may look functional at first glance. But most of them end up as "cookie-cutter business systems" built on misunderstandings of real workflows and how people actually work.

approach.title: We don't just turn requests into features.
approach.titleHighlight: We use AI to avoid misunderstanding the business.
approach.description: We don't simply convert client requests into features. We look beyond the words to understand business flows, role differences, unspoken constraints, and potential bottlenecks. That's why we use AI — not to add features, but to avoid misunderstanding the business.

judgment.title: AI presents countless options.
judgment.titleHighlight: That's exactly why human experience matters.
judgment.description: Which ideas to discard, which parts to leave as manual operations instead of systemizing — these judgments can only be made by people who have actually worked on-site and built business systems.

pairCoding.title: Not a method to build faster.
pairCoding.titleHighlight: A development process to correct course quickly.
pairCoding.description: AI pair coding is a development process for catching mistakes early and correcting direction. We don't delegate work to AI — we work alongside AI to deeply understand the business and build only the systems that will truly be used.

manifesto.ctaButton: Learn more about AI Pair Coding

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: AI solutions that support people from daily life to business

vision.title: From Prototype Creation to System Development
vision.description: We provide comprehensive solutions across a wide range of industries, from prototype creation to full-scale system development.

aiPairCoding.description: A new development model where apps come to life from conversations

cta.title: Ready to explore the possibilities of AI together?

items.title: Rapid expansion of generative AI applications in education
items.summary: Large language models like OpenAI's GPT-4 and Google Bard are being utilized in educational settings, improving efficiency in personalized instruction and curriculum development.

items.title: Accelerating adoption of enterprise RAG systems
items.summary: Enterprise search systems utilizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation technology are gaining attention, with expectations for improved information management efficiency.

items.title: New possibilities for AI music production tools
items.summary: AI-powered music production tools are evolving, creating new forms of artistic expression through collaboration between artists and AI.
